failure_modes.cause: BPR set to 5.0 bar, but required is 294.8 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle 294.8 bar to prevent overpressure

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG exceeds pump inlet pressure at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged exposure to 120°C may degrade PFA components
failure_modes.mitigation: Conduct regular inspections and replace PFA components as needed

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Test BPR with water at 300 bar to ensure it can handle required pressure
Run blank solvent at Q=10.96701 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct thermal cycling test on PFA components at 120°C for 100 hours
